use_cases: Displaying status indicators on email list items
Showing category tags for email filtering
Indicating read/unread states in email interfaces
Showing sender type badges like work or personal
ai_summary: A lightweight Badge component with variant support (default, secondary, destructive, outline) designed for email card contexts. Features hover state transitions and focus accessibility rings, making it suitable for displaying email metadata like tags, status indicators, or sender labels in inbox interfaces.
